description: A scan of a filled-in immigration detainer form. Fields at the top record an individual's name (Amatitla, Roman), a date of birth and a date the request was received (04/14/2026). Checkboxes mark documents received from ICE/DHS, including a notice of action and a warrant for arrest of alien, followed by a 'PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST' section with several options.
notable_text: DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM ICE/DHS; Form I-247A; Form I-200 (Warrant for Arrest of Alien); PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST
